candidates.row_label: Amortization & Impairment of Intangibles in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicit D&A/impairment line tied to cost of revenues, but it appears as a sub-component of the selected parent row 'Cost of sales' because adjacent duplicate cost-of-sales lines and total indicate the selected COGS row already includes it. Adding separately would risk double counting.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of sales'. The operating-section layout shows 'Amortization & Impairment of Intangibles in Cost of Revenues' as a component within cost of sales rather than a same-level add-on outside the selected bucket.

candidates.row_label: Amortization & Impairment of Intangibles in Marketing expenses
candidates.why: Explicit D&A/impairment line tied to marketing, but it appears as a component beneath the selected parent row 'Marketing expenses'. The duplicate marketing lines imply the selected marketing expense already embeds this amount.

candidates.row_label: Amortization & Impairment of Intangibles in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: Explicit D&A/impairment line tied to administrative expenses, but it appears as a component beneath the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses'. The duplicate administrative lines imply the selected admin expense already embeds this amount.

candidates.row_label: Amortization & Impairment of Intangibles in R&D
candidates.why: Explicit D&A/impairment line tied to R&D, but the selected reference buckets already include 'Research and development expenses' in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Under the special R&D rule, this should not be added separately because it appears to be a component of the selected R&D line and separate addition could distort the intended XSGA minus XRD treatment.

variables.notes: All visible operating D&A rows for marketing, administrative, and R&D appear to be nested components of already selected parent expense rows. No separate same-level SG&A D&A summary row appears outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket, so no additional XSGA_DA row should be added.
